Why Josh Allen is the best player in the NFL
Buffalo Bills 2026 scouting report: defensive end Landon Jackson
The View from Patriots Wire
stories.summary:
Came across this article:
	
	“The Patriots have seemingly pulled away in the race with the many moves they've made in the offseason.



	 



	Meanwhile, the Bills haven't done much of anything to signal they'll be any better than they were last year. One could even argue that they'll take a step back after firing head coach Sean McDermott. Josh Allen is Superman on the football field, but he's going to need more than D.J. Moore and a middle-of-the-road defense to fly high enough to reach his first Super Bowl….



	 



	The Bills have to be seeing the moves being made by the Patriots, and it would be hard to imagine them feeling good about their offseason in relation to the competition. They are now faced with a situation where the Patriots have one of the best young quarterbacks in the league in Drake Maye and a top-10 defensive unit that gave Allen problems last season.



	 



	Will the Bills ever wake up and realize fighting fire with fire is much better than laying the hopes and dreams of an entire franchise on the shoulders of one man?”



	 



	Do you think this is justified or comically arrogant?

stories.title: Throwback Thursday Bills vs Dophins ‘90 Playoffs
stories.summary:
Kelly playing after 3 weeks sidelined with a knee injury at the Giants . Frank Reich became a Buffalo legend, leading us to the Division title at home vs these same Dolphins. We had a fantastic season featuring 3 remarkable comebacks in a row. Huge Primetime wins at home as Thurman Thomas led the League in total yards from scrimmage. Andre Reed & James Lofton were spectacular all season and our Defense was intimidating!



	 



	Expectations were high for our 1st ever trip to the Super Bowl but we had to beat Marino and the ‘fish’ again. An all time classic game!



	 



	Enjoy!

stories.title: If There Was a First Song to be Played at the New Stadium What Song Would You Like it to Be ?
stories.summary:
So the Bills will be opening their new home Highmark Stadium this season & I was wondering what song would you all think should be fitting for the very first jam on their brand new Kick A** sound system with the Mafia on hand ? 



	 



	Of course one of the all time favorite sayings that is bound to be used is the Marvism "Where would you rather be than right here - Right now" So I thought if they could incorporate this song with that Marvism it would be fitting .



	 



	I know we have had other posts in the past of songs that we felt should be played when the team comes on the field & such but this one I would like to keep just a bit different ! Lets keep this one to something to do about a new start, a new home, Starting over, something of that sort . But it's got to rock, no slushy love song type songs  this is the Bills new home so lets start it by blowing the top of the place .



	 



	I love the intro to this song which could be playing in the back ground with the stadium lights doing some cool type of visual thing to match the piano riff while someone was doing a introduction of sorts like "where else would you rather be than Right here (then BANG the lyrics & fans come in) - RIGHT NOW !!! Jam on !!



	 



	Then of course at the end fire works  all around the canopy !! 



	 



	So give out some ideas as far as the song but remember keep it on the subject of something new as I said in the previous sentence ... 



	 



	What say you Mafia ???

stories.title: Buchanan, Smith named finalists for NLL Awards
stories.summary: Buffalo Bandits forwards Dhane Smith and Kyle Buchanan have been named finalists for the NLL’s end-of-season awards, the league announced Wednesday.   Smith was tabbed as a finalist for both NLL MVP and Offensive Player of the Year while Buchanan is up for the NLL’s Sportsmanship Award.   It’s the second consecutive season both players are finalists for their respective awards as Smith is the reigning Offensive […]

stories.title: Bandits’ season ends with 1st-round loss to Georgia

Thompson tallied four goals and six assists to set a playoff career-high in points […]

That uncertainty continued into early February as a 3-1 start was followed […]

stories.title: TBDAHOT: Rollcall
stories.summary:
I understand things may look drastically different this year, but I want to get a sense who’s up for keeping this tradition going!



	 



	Please let me know if you want to get together for the home opener this year. It doesn’t matter if you’ve gone to 1, 25 or if you have never attended one. Everyone’s welcome! Even if you don’t plan on going inside for the game.



	 



	With regards to this topic, I do not have any interest in people who are going and plan to het together elsewhere. Enjoy yourself, be safe, but do not talk about it in this topic.



	 



	I don’t want to officially speak for others, but I believe me, Jay Rosen, and Guffalo are definitely carrying on the tradition. 



	 



	Who else?

stories.title: Matt Miller’s 7 Round Mock
stories.summary:
For my money, Miller is the best in the business. Here’s his latest 7 round mock:



	 



	https://www.espn.com/nfl/draft2026/story/_/id/48299038/2026-nfl-mock-draft-seven-rounds-257-picks-projections-matt-miller
	 



	Bills picks:



	26 - Omar Cooper - WR - Indiana



	91 - Derrick Moore - Edge - Michigan



	126. Devin Moore - CB - Florida



	165. Billy Schrauth - G - ND



	168. Xavian Sorey Jr. - LB - Arkansas



	182. Nadame Tucker - Edge - Western Michigan



	220. Dalton Johnson - S - Arizona



	 



	My biggest takeaway is that the Bills are adding a lot of guys named Moore this offseason.
